requirements.statement: When an order is placed, reserve inventory and create a pending order record.
requirements.why: The order is the unit of revenue; a lost reservation oversells stock.

requirements.statement: When an order is paid, transition it to confirmed and emit an order-confirmed event.
requirements.why: Downstream fulfilment keys off the confirmed event.

requirements.statement: When an order is cancelled, release the reserved inventory within the cancellation window.
requirements.why: Held inventory on dead orders starves real demand.
